relationships.summary: The repository documents and carries the Core SDK project.
The Core SDK implements the XanaNode protocol.
The Core SDK consumes protocol schemas, registries, and docs from the protocol repository.
The Core CLI is the machine-facing executable surface of the Core SDK.
The Core SDK repository contains bin/xananode.js.
Bin / Xananode supports the Core SDK implementation.
The Core SDK repository contains LICENSE.
The Core SDK repository contains media/images/xananode-icon.svg.
